text:
National Death Index (NDI)

 SAS Name
 Variable Name

 BENE_ID 
 Encrypted 723 Beneficiary ID (Unique Key) 

 STATE_CD 
 State Code (MESF) 

 MSIS_ID 
 Encrypted Medicaid State ID Number 

 REF_YR 
 Record Reference Year 

 DM_SOURCE 
 Dual or Medicaid only enrollee 

 DEATH_DT 
 Date of Death 

 NDI_DOD 
 NDI Date of Death 

 NDI_MATCH 
 Death confirmed through NDI match 

 NDI_STATE_DEATH_CD 
 NDI State of Death 

 DEATH_CERT_NUM 
 NDI Death Certificate Number 

 ICD_CODE 
 ICD-10 Code
